cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Selected top5 candidates have the highest scores and align well with the most frequent digits per position, especially positions 1 (4,3,8), 2 (6,3,5), 3 (3,6,9), 4 (4,1,5), 5 (9,2,0), 6 (1,0,7), and 7 (9,3,4). The top50 extends this selection to include numbers with strong scores and digit patterns consistent with historical frequency trends, ensuring coverage of the most recurrent digits while avoiding duplicates.
